summary: Renamed a set of unknown MSL/math/printf symbols and their cross-references from address-derived func_/lbl_ names to recognizable library names. The PR labels printf/vsprintf internals, logf/expf/powf/asinf/wcstombs, MSL printf data such as __files, __StringWrite, __FileWrite, __pformatter, and logf lookup/constants such as __ln_F, __one_over_F, __float_nan, and __float_huge. It also updates C headers and decompiled C users so asm and source agree on the new symbols. There was no PR body or review discussion; one collaborator approval merged it.
what_changed: Renamed asm/MSL/math.s func_803265A8 to logf and labeled logf rodata/SDA symbols __ln_F, __one_over_F, __float_nan, and __float_huge.

Renamed asm/MSL/printf.s symbols: func_80323DC8 to vsprintf, func_80323EB4 to printf, func_80324044 to __pformatter, func_80324674 to float2str, func_80324CAC to round_decimal, func_80324DE0 to longlong2str, func_803250C0 to long2str, and func_803252E4 to parse_format.
Labeled printf helper/data symbols __StringWrite, __FileWrite, and __files, and updated all internal lis/addi/bl references in printf.s to the new names.
Removed some unnecessary .global directives from internal branch labels inside printf.s conversion/parser routines, leaving them as local labels rather than exported symbols.
Renamed asm/melee/lb/lbunknown_002.s func_8000CE50 to expf and func_8000CEE0 to powf, including the internal powf call to expf.

Updated asm call sites in AXDriver.s, bytecode.s, reverb_hi.s, reverb_std.s, ft_unknown_006.s, code_801601C4.s, text_4.s, mtx.s, and sislib.s to call powf, expf, logf, asinf, printf, or vsprintf instead of func_ names.
Updated C declarations and definitions: MSL.h now declares vsprintf; MSL/math.h declares float logf(float); cstring.c and cstring.h rename func_8032388C to wcstombs.
Renamed the decompiled trigonometric helper func_80022DBC to asinf in lbrefract.h and lbrefract_003.c, then updated C callers in ground.c, lbvector.c, and sysdolphin/baselib/mtx.c.
Renamed the external printf file table in debug.c from lbl_80400430 to __files and updated accesses to __files.unk84 and __files.unk52.
smart_moves: Applied label changes transitively across asm callers, C declarations, C definitions, and externs, reducing the risk of mixed old/new symbol names.
Used standard C/library names where behavior was evidently known: printf, vsprintf, wcstombs, logf, expf, powf, and asinf.
Kept MSL-internal naming style with double-underscore symbols for runtime internals such as __pformatter, __StringWrite, __FileWrite, __files, __ln_F, __one_over_F, __float_nan, and __float_huge.
Converted address labels used only as internal control-flow targets in printf.s away from .global exports, which makes the symbol table less noisy for future matching.

Labeled shared math routines first, then propagated those names into unrelated systems such as AXDriver, bytecode, reverb, ground, and matrix code, making later decompilation call graphs easier to read.
decomp_lessons: When an unknown function has a standard-library identity, rename both the asm label and every source/header prototype at the same time; partial renames leave confusing duplicate identities.
MSL internals often use double-underscore names, while public C library entry points use normal lowercase names like printf, vsprintf, logf, expf, powf, asinf, and wcstombs.
Data labels matter as much as function labels: tables such as __ln_F and __one_over_F clarify the algorithm implemented by logf, and __files clarifies printf/debug file-table accesses.
After naming a function, update assembly branch/call operands rather than only the global label definition; this improves grep/search utility and reveals cross-system dependencies.
Do not export every local branch target in hand-written asm. Removing .global from internal lbl_ labels can make global symbol lists cleaner without changing code generation.

Source comments such as an existing '// asin' hint in lbvector.c can be used as evidence to promote a placeholder name to a real function name, but the PR itself provides no detailed rationale beyond the diff.
naming_conventions: Public C/MSL functions use standard lowercase names: printf, vsprintf, wcstombs, logf, expf, powf, asinf.
MSL/private runtime helpers and data use leading double underscores: __pformatter, __StringWrite, __FileWrite, __files, __ln_F, __one_over_F, __float_nan, __float_huge.
Internal formatter helper names are descriptive snake/lowercase hybrids matching library semantics: parse_format, long2str, longlong2str, float2str, round_decimal.
Address-derived names func_XXXXXXXX and lbl_XXXXXXXX were replaced when a semantic identity was available.
Branch-local labels inside asm routines remained lbl_XXXXXXXX but were no longer marked .global in several printf.s places.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Performed label-only asm edits: symbol names changed while instruction addresses/opcodes in the diff remain the same.
Updated @ha/@l relocations for renamed data/function labels, for example lbl_803B8F50 to __ln_F and lbl_80400430 to __files.
Updated bl operands across assembly files to use the new library names while preserving branch destinations.
Synchronized asm symbol names with C prototypes to allow decompiled C files to call asinf, wcstombs, logf, and vsprintf directly.
Used known constant/table usage as identification evidence: logf references __ln_F, __one_over_F, __float_nan, and __float_huge.
Reduced exported asm symbols by deleting .global directives for internal computed-branch case labels in printf.s.

review_feedback.note: No issue comments, review comments, or PR body text were present in the provided slice, so there is no explicit reviewer rationale to extract.

follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that decompile asm/MSL/printf.s after __pformatter, parse_format, long2str, longlong2str, float2str, and round_decimal were labeled.
Find PRs that move expf, powf, asinf, or logf into proper MSL/math source files or improve their prototypes.
Search for remaining func_80323 or func_80324 references that may be printf/MSL formatter internals.
Search for remaining references to lbl_80400430 to confirm all __files uses were renamed consistently.
Search for remaining func_80022DBC, func_8000CE50, func_8000CEE0, and func_803265A8 references after this PR.
